Sikafloor-263 SL.description: SELF-SMOOTHING PIGMENTED EPOXY RESIN FOR FLOORING APPLICATION

items.Packaging: Please refer to local country price list for available packaging sizes: Part A 15.8 kg containers Part B 4.2 kg containers Part A + B 20 kg ready to mix units
items.Storage conditions: The product must be stored in original, unopened and undamaged sealed packaging in dry conditions at temperatures between +5 °C and +30 °C.
items.Appearance and colour: Resin - Part A Coloured, liquid Hardener - Part B Transparent, liquid Available in various colour shades, please request Sika sales representative for colour chart. Under direct sun light there may be some discolouration and colour variation; this has no influence on the function and performance of the coating.
items.Solid content by mass: ~100 % Note: Total solid epoxy composition acc. to the test method Deutsche Bauchemie e.V. (German Association for construction chemicals)
items.Solid content by volume: ~100 % Note: Total solid epoxy composition acc. to the test method Deutsche Bauchemie e.V. (German Association for construction chemicals)

Exposure*.Short-term moist/wet heat*: up to +80 °C where exposure is only occasional (steam cleaning etc.). *No simultaneous chemical and mechanical exposure and only in combination with Sikafloor® systems as a broadcast system with approximately 3 to 4 mm thickness.

items.Temperature resistance: Reaction to Fire (Critical Radiant Flux): Classification: Class I (ASTM E648)

Sikafloor®-263 SL.description: Product data sheet for Sikafloor®-263 SL, a self-smoothing epoxy floor coating system
